/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/minigzip.dir/test/minigzip.c.o -o minigzip  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/houjunren/Desktop/OSCA_cis-trans/build/Release/_deps/zlib-build libz.1.3.1.dylib
